mapper.select: select id, plaza, publisher_user_id, (select avatar_url from user_profile p where p.user_id = home_post.publisher_user_id limit 1) as publisher_avatar_url, category, title, status, tags, description, expected_time, expected_location, aa_fee, publisher_name, publisher_status, publisher_status_note, avatar_text, anonymous, verified, current_count, max_count, current_state, hope_you_can, preferred_way, gentle_replies from home_post where deleted = 0 and review_status = 'visible' and plaza = 'match' and id = #{id} limit 1

select id, plaza, publisher_user_id, (select avatar_url from user_profile p where p.user_id = home_post.publisher_user_id limit 1) as publisher_avatar_url, category, title, status, tags, description, expected_time, expected_location, aa_fee, publisher_name, publisher_status, publisher_status_note, avatar_text, anonymous, verified, current_count, max_count, current_state, hope_you_can, preferred_way, gentle_replies from home_post where deleted = 0 and review_status = 'visible' and plaza = 'vent' and id = #{id} limit 1

select id, post_id, user_id, author_name, avatar_text, content, like_count, review_status, deleted, created_at, updated_at from home_post_reply where deleted = 0 and review_status = 'visible' and post_id = #{postId} order by created_at asc, id asc limit 50
select verified, verify_status from user_profile where user_id = #{userId} limit 1

select id, user_id, notice_type, source_type, source_id, aggregate_count, read_status, created_at, updated_at from home_notification where user_id = #{userId} order by updated_at desc, id desc limit 20
mapper.update: update home_post set current_count = current_count + 1 where id = #{postId} and plaza = 'vent' and deleted = 0 and review_status = 'visible'
mapper.insert: insert into home_notification (user_id, notice_type, source_type, source_id, aggregate_count, read_status, created_at, updated_at) values (#{userId}, 'post_like', 'home_post', #{postId}, 1, 'unread', now(), now()) on duplicate key update aggregate_count = aggregate_count + 1, read_status = 'unread', updated_at = now()
mapper.update: update home_notification set read_status = 'read' where user_id = #{userId} and read_status = 'unread'
mapper.insert: insert into home_post (plaza, publisher_user_id, category, title, status, tags, description, expected_time, expected_location, aa_fee, publisher_name, publisher_status, publisher_status_note, avatar_text, anonymous, verified, current_count, max_count, current_state, hope_you_can, preferred_way, gentle_replies, review_status, sort_weight, deleted) values (#{plaza}, #{publisherUserId}, #{category}, #{title}, #{status}, #{tags}, #{description}, #{expectedTime}, #{expectedLocation}, #{aaFee}, #{publisherName}, #{publisherStatus}, #{publisherStatusNote}, #{avatarText}, #{anonymous}, #{verified}, #{currentCount}, #{maxCount}, #{currentState}, #{hopeYouCan}, #{preferredWay}, #{gentleReplies}, 'visible', 100, 0)
mapper.update: update home_post set category = #{category}, title = #{title}, tags = #{tags}, description = #{description}, expected_time = #{expectedTime}, expected_location = #{expectedLocation}, aa_fee = #{aaFee}, max_count = #{maxCount}, anonymous = #{anonymous}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id} and publisher_user_id = #{publisherUserId} and plaza = 'match' and deleted = 0 and review_status = 'visible'
mapper.insert: insert into home_post_reply (post_id, user_id, author_name, avatar_text, content, like_count, review_status, deleted, created_at, updated_at) values (#{postId}, #{userId}, #{authorName}, #{avatarText}, #{content}, #{likeCount}, #{reviewStatus}, #{deleted}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
insert into home_post_report (post_id, reporter_user_id, reason, detail, contact, status, created_at) values (#{postId}, #{reporterUserId}, #{reason}, #{detail}, #{contact}, #{status}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: select request_id, post_id, requester_user_id, status, created_at, updated_at from home_match_request where post_id = #{postId} and requester_user_id = #{requesterUserId} limit 1

select r.request_id, r.post_id, r.requester_user_id, r.status, r.created_at, r.updated_at, p.publisher_user_id, p.title, p.category, p.description, p.expected_time, p.expected_location, req.nickname as requester_name, req.avatar_url as requester_avatar_url, pub.nickname as publisher_name, pub.avatar_url as publisher_avatar_url, ( select count(1) from home_match_request c where c.post_id = r.post_id ) as request_count from home_match_request r join home_post p on p.id = r.post_id join user_profile req on req.user_id = r.requester_user_id left join user_profile pub on pub.user_id = p.publisher_user_id where r.request_id = #{requestId} limit 1

select r.request_id, r.post_id, r.requester_user_id, r.status, r.created_at, r.updated_at, p.publisher_user_id, p.title, p.category, p.description, p.expected_time, p.expected_location, req.nickname as requester_name, req.avatar_url as requester_avatar_url, pub.nickname as publisher_name, pub.avatar_url as publisher_avatar_url, ( select count(1) from home_match_request c where c.post_id = r.post_id ) as request_count from home_match_request r join home_post p on p.id = r.post_id join user_profile req on req.user_id = r.requester_user_id left join user_profile pub on pub.user_id = p.publisher_user_id where p.publisher_user_id = #{userId} and p.plaza = 'match' and p.deleted = 0 and p.review_status = 'visible' order by case r.status when 'pending' then 0 when 'approved' then 1 else 2 end, r.updated_at desc, r.request_id desc limit 20

select r.request_id, r.post_id, r.requester_user_id, r.status, r.created_at, r.updated_at, p.publisher_user_id, p.title, p.category, p.description, p.expected_time, p.expected_location, req.nickname as requester_name, req.avatar_url as requester_avatar_url, pub.nickname as publisher_name, pub.avatar_url as publisher_avatar_url, ( select count(1) from home_match_request c where c.post_id = r.post_id ) as request_count from home_match_request r join home_post p on p.id = r.post_id join user_profile req on req.user_id = r.requester_user_id left join user_profile pub on pub.user_id = p.publisher_user_id where r.requester_user_id = #{userId} and p.plaza = 'match' and p.deleted = 0 and p.review_status = 'visible' order by r.updated_at desc, r.request_id desc limit 20

select r.request_id, r.post_id, r.requester_user_id, r.status, r.created_at, r.updated_at, p.title, p.category, req.avatar_url as requester_avatar_url, pub.avatar_url as publisher_avatar_url from home_match_request r join home_post p on p.id = r.post_id join user_profile req on req.user_id = r.requester_user_id left join user_profile pub on pub.user_id = p.publisher_user_id where r.status = 'approved' and (r.requester_user_id = #{userId} or p.publisher_user_id = #{userId}) order by r.updated_at desc, r.request_id desc limit 5
select count(1) from home_post where publisher_user_id = #{userId} and plaza = 'match' and deleted = 0 and review_status = 'visible'
select count(1) from home_match_request r join home_post p on p.id = r.post_id where (r.requester_user_id = #{userId} or p.publisher_user_id = #{userId}) and r.status = #{status}
mapper.insert: insert into home_match_request (post_id, requester_user_id, status, created_at, updated_at) values (#{postId}, #{requesterUserId}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: update home_match_request r join home_post p on p.id = r.post_id set r.status = 'approved', r.updated_at = now() where r.request_id = #{requestId} and p.publisher_user_id = #{publisherUserId} and r.status = 'pending'

update home_match_request r join home_post p on p.id = r.post_id set r.status = 'rejected', r.updated_at = now() where r.request_id = #{requestId} and p.publisher_user_id = #{publisherUserId} and r.status = 'pending'

update home_post set current_count = current_count + 1, status = case when current_count + 1 >= max_count then 'full' else status end, updated_at = now() where id = #{postId} and plaza = 'match' and deleted = 0 and review_status = 'visible' and current_count < max_count
